title: BEM-689 check final agreement
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-19 | 05:41 (UTC+3)'

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

# Search explicit Claude final decisions and final protocol artifacts.
inbound_dirs=[Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]
responses=[]
for d in inbound_dirs:
    if d.exists():
        for f in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if f.is_file():
                txt=read(f)
                low=(f.name+' '+txt).lower()
                if 'bem682' in low or 'bem-682' in low or 'bem679' in low or 'bem-679' in low or 'final decision' in low or 'consolidated protocol' in low:
                    up=txt.upper()
                    decision='UNKNOWN'
                    if 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up or 'APPROVE' in up:
                        decision='APPROVE'
                    elif 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up:
                        decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up:
                        decision='BLOCKED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(f),'decision':decision,'preview':txt[:1000]})
final_paths=[]
for p in ['governance/protocols/MULTI_AGENT_REPO_INFRASTRUCTURE_PROTOCOL_FINAL.md','governance/reports/bem679_final_agreed_multi_agent_infrastructure_protocol.md','governance/roadmap/MULTI_AGENT_REPO_INFRASTRUCTURE_PROTOCOL_FINAL.md','governance/agreements/final/multi_agent_repo_infrastructure_protocol.md']:
    if Path(p).exists():
        final_paths.append(p)
approved=any(x['decision']=='APPROVE' for x in responses)
changed=any(x['decision']=='CHANGE_REQUIRED' for x in responses)
blocked=any(x['decision']=='BLOCKED' for x in responses)
final_exists=bool(final_paths)
if approved and final_exists:
    status='fully_agreed_final_protocol_exists'
    answer='Да, согласовано: есть APPROVE от Claude и финальный protocol artifact.'
elif approved:
    status='approved_by_claude_final_artifact_missing'
    answer='Claude дал APPROVE, но финальный consolidated protocol ещё не оформлен отдельным FINAL-файлом.'
elif changed:
    status='change_required_not_agreed'
    answer='Нет, пока не согласовано: Claude запросил изменения.'
elif blocked:
    status='blocked_not_agreed'
    answer='Нет, согласование заблокировано Claude.'
elif responses:
    status='response_exists_no_final_decision'
    answer='Ответы Claude есть, но явного APPROVE / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED по финальному consolidated protocol не найдено.'
else:
    status='no_final_claude_response_found'
    answer='Нет, финальный ответ Claude по consolidated protocol пока не найден.'
blocker=None if approved and final_exists else {'code':'PROTOCOL_NOT_FULLY_AGREED_YET','status':status,'needs':'Claude explicit APPROVE and final protocol file'}
state={'schema_version':'check_claude_protocol_final_agreement.v1','bem':'BEM-689','status':status,'answer':answer,'responses':responses,'final_paths':final_paths,'approved':approved,'change_required':changed,'blocked':blocked,'final_exists':final_exists,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem689_check_claude_protocol_final_agreement.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem689_check_claude_protocol_final_agreement.md')
lines=['# BEM-689 | Check Claude Protocol Final Agreement','', 'Дата: '+created, '', 'Answer: '+answer, '', 'Status: '+status, '', 'Responses: '+str(len(responses)), 'Final files: '+str(len(final_paths)), '', 'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))]
report.write_text(sep.join(lines)+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem689_check_claude_protocol_final_agreement','status':status,'answer':answer,'responses':len(responses),'final_paths':final_paths,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem689_check_claude_protocol_final_agreement.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-689 '+status+'\n'+answer+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked mailbox and final protocol paths for explicit Claude final agreement on multi-agent infrastructure protocol')
"""
No issue comments.
